title: Rebound in Coal India's Stockpiles
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal India (which is responsible for over 75% of India's coal output) produced 68 million tons of coal last month. This is up month-on-month by 13.6 million tons (21%) and up year-on-year by 800,000 tons (2%). Previously, Coal India's output had contracted on a year-on-year basis during eight of the prior ten months.
